chunks.heading: Front matter
chunks.notes: Ingested front matter of JavaScript Allongé (pages 1-13). Key claims: Book focuses on functional programming with JavaScript, explains ECMAScript 2015 updates, and uses Leanpub for publishing. Entities added: reg-raganwald-braithwaite, axel-rauschmayer. Concepts created: functional-programming, ecmascript-2015, leanpub. Pages written: javascriptallonge-frontend, reg-raganwald-braithwaite, axel-rauschmayer, functional-programming, ecmascript-2015, leanpub.

chunks.heading: Forewords to the First Edition
chunks.notes: Processed forewords of JavaScript Allongé (pages 14-29). Created source page for forewords, updated leanpub concept, and added entity pages for Michael Fogus and Matthew Knox. Introduced concept pages for value-types, reference-types, arrays, and floating-point-numbers. Cited all content with (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.14-29).

chunks.heading: As Little As Possible About Functions, But No Less
chunks.notes: Key claims: Functions are reference types (non-identical on redefinition), `void` operator generates `undefined`, call-by-value with call-by-sharing for references. Entities touched: function, undefined, call-by-value. Pages written: javascriptallonge-as-little-as-possible-about-functions-but-no-less (source), function (entity), undefined (entity), call-by-value (concept).

chunks.heading: Closures and Scope
chunks.notes: Wrote source page [[javascriptallonge-closures-and-scope]] on closures, scope chains, and pure functions. Updated [[functional-programming]], [[function]], and [[javascript]] pages with closure mechanics, scope hierarchy, and IIFE patterns. Key claims: closures capture outer variables, scope chains enable nested access, pure functions vs. closures, shadowing, and global environment isolation.

chunks.heading: That Constant Coffee Craving
chunks.notes: Created source page [[javascriptallonge-chapter-5]] and concept pages [[const]], [[lexical-scoping]], [[IIFE]] to document JavaScript's const keyword, lexical scoping rules, and IIFE pattern. Key claims: const provides block-scoped bindings that shadow but don't overwrite outer variables; lexical scoping resolves names based on static code structure; IIFEs enable isolated value binding but are less readable than const.

chunks.heading: Naming Functions
chunks.notes: Wrote source page [[javascriptallonge-naming-functions]] and updated concept pages [[function]], [[combinator]], and [[function-decorator]]. Key claims: function declaration hoisting, named function expressions, combinators like compose, and decorators like not. Entities: function declarations, combinators, decorators.

chunks.heading: Recipes with Basic Functions
chunks.notes: Created source page [[javascriptallonge-recipes-with-basic-functions]] and concept pages for partial-application, unary-functions, and left-variadic-functions. Key claims include partial application techniques, unary function decorators, and left-variadic function patterns from JavaScriptAllonge (p.79-93).

chunks.heading: Picking the Bean: Choice and Truthiness
chunks.notes: Key claims: JavaScript's truthiness determines logical operators (!, &&, ||) and conditionals; ternary operator as control-flow; array destructuring with gathering. Pages written: source pages for 'picking-the-bean' and 'composing-and-decomposing-data', concept pages for truthiness, logical-operators, ternary-operator, and array-destructuring.

chunks.heading: Self-Similarity
chunks.notes: Created source page [[javascriptallonge-self-similarity]] and concept pages [[linear-recursion]], [[tail-call-optimization]], [[folding]], and [[mapping]]. Key claims: recursion in array operations, linear recursion patterns, tail-call optimization for performance, and default arguments in recursive functions.

chunks.heading: Garbage, Garbage Everywhere
chunks.notes: Key claims: JavaScript array recursion is inefficient due to temporary array copying; Lisp's linked lists (cons cells) offer better performance. Pages written: source [[javascriptallonge-garbage-garbage-everywhere]], concept pages [[arrays]], [[linked-lists]], [[object-destructuring]].

chunks.heading: Mutation
chunks.notes: Wrote source page [[javascriptallonge-mutation]] on JavaScript mutation mechanics. Updated [[arrays]], [[linked-lists]], and [[array-destructuring]] with insights on mutation, aliases, and destructuring. Key claims: `const` allows mutation but not rebinding; `let` vs `var` scope differences; linked list structure sharing vs array copying.

chunks.heading: Copy on Write
chunks.notes: Ingested chapter on Copy on Write (pages 158-176) from JavaScriptAllonge. Created source page [[javascriptallonge-copy-on-write]] and updated [[linked-lists]], [[array-destructuring]]. Added new concept pages [[tortoise-and-hare-algorithm]] and [[functional-iterators]] for loop detection and iterator patterns. Key claims: copy-on-write tradeoffs, structure sharing in linked lists vs arrays, and functional iterators for lazy evaluation.

chunks.heading: Making Data Out Of Functions
chunks.notes: Ingested chapter on functional data structures and combinators from JavaScriptAllonge. Key claims: 1) K, I, V combinators enable data structures without arrays/objects. 2) Vireo (V) creates pairs/lists via function application. 3) mapWith/flip demonstrate currying and functional composition. Pages created: [[javascriptallonge-making-data-out-of-functions]] (source), [[combinator]], [[functional-data-structures]], [[mapwith-and-flip]].

chunks.heading: Object.assign
chunks.notes: Wrote source page [[javascriptallonge-object-assign]] on Object.assign for shallow cloning/merging and quasi-literals (template strings). Created concept pages [[object-assign]] and [[quasi-literals]]. Key claims: Object.assign enables shallow copying, quasi-literals improve string interpolation readability. Entities touched: JavaScript features.

chunks.heading: Iteration and Iterables
chunks.notes: Key claims: Introduced iterators (functional/object-based), iterables via Symbol.iterator, and ordered collections with operations like mapWith. Pages written: [[javascriptallonge-iteration-and-iterables]] (source), [[functional-iterators]], [[iterable]], [[ordered-collection]].

chunks.heading: Generating Iterables
chunks.notes: Ingested chapter on JavaScript generators (pages 224-245). Key claims: Generators simplify iterators via implicit state management, enable coroutines, and streamline iterable creation. Pages written/updated: [[javascriptallonge-generating-iterables]] (source), [[generator]] (entity), [[coroutine]] (concept), and [[iterable]] (concept).

chunks.heading: Lazy and Eager Collections
chunks.notes: Created source page [[javascriptallonge-lazy-eager-collections]] and concept pages [[lazy-evaluation]] and [[eager-evaluation]]. Updated [[javascriptallonge-iteration-and-iterables]] to link to lazy/eager collections. Key claims: lazy collections use iterators for memory efficiency, eager collections process data immediately with copy-on-read. Entities touched: Pair, Stack, Numbers, LazyCollection, EagerCollection.

chunks.heading: Interlude: The Carpenter Interviews for a Job
chunks.notes: Wrote source page for 'javascriptallonge-interlude-the-carpenter-interviews-for-a-job' and concept pages for 'floyd-s-cycle-finding-algorithm' and 'stateful-map'. Updated 'iterable' and 'lazy-evaluation' concepts with details from the chapter. Key claims: Using iterables and stateful mapping to detect cycles via Floyd's algorithm. Entities touched: The Carpenter, Christine, Bob Plissken. Pages written: 3.

chunks.heading: Interactive Generators
chunks.notes: Key claims: Interactive generators enable stateful functions (e.g., Naughts and Crosses game), contrasting stateless lookups with stateful control flow. Iterable operations (mapWith, zip, memoize) are detailed. Entities: generators, stateful functions, iterables. Pages written: javascriptallonge-interactive-generators (source), updated javascriptallonge-generating-iterables and javascriptallonge-iteration-and-iterables.

chunks.heading: Copyright Notice
chunks.notes: Wrote source page [[javascriptallonge-copyright-notice]] summarizing copyright details, authorship, and image licenses from pages 293-297. Updated entity page [[reg-raganwald-braithwaite]] with author's contact information and websites. No further pages needed; chunk fully integrated.
